mean_cn: prep.在附近，关于，在……周围，忙于；  adv.附近，大约，转向，左右，周围
mean_en: on the subject of somebody/something; in connection with somebody/something; used to describe the purpose or an aspect of something; busy with something; doing something
sentence: This is a story about courage—a boy fights against a dragon.
sentence_trans: 这是一个关于勇气的故事——小男孩与恶龙作斗争。
word_etyma: a在...上面 + bo位于，靠近 + ut在...外面 → 某事物的各个方面 → about附近，周围，有关
